query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.projectState,
  p.sector,
  p.stageCode,
  p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value
HAVING sr_count > 0
ORDER BY sr_count DESC
LIMIT 12;

SELECT

  p.name,
  p.productLane,
  p.projectState,
  p.sector,
  p.stageCode,
  p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW', 'VIC', 'SA', 'TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value
HAVING sr_count > 0
ORDER BY sr_count DESC
LIMIT 12;
